title: Perform a ground-based tree defect evaluation
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform a ground-based tree defect evaluation demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Determine evaluation requirements

pcs.text: Confirm trees to be evaluated according to client brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm trees to be evaluated according to client brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm trees to be evaluated according to client brief.

pcs.text: Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA) and record and implement control measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA) and record and implement control measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Undertake a site-specific job safety analysis (JSA) and record and implement control measures.

pcs.text: Determine tree health and hazard benchmarks for project according to industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine tree health and hazard benchmarks for project according to industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine tree health and hazard benchmarks for project according to industry standards.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Determine evaluation requirements

elements.title: Examine tree visually for indicators of potential failure

pcs.text: Examine tree for indicators of general poor health
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Examine tree for indicators of general poor health?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Examine tree for indicators of general poor health.

pcs.text: Examine tree for visual defects
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Examine tree for visual defects?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Examine tree for visual defects.

pcs.text: Examine tree for indication of damage from organisms
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Examine tree for indication of damage from organisms?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Examine tree for indication of damage from organisms.

pcs.text: Assess examination outcomes to determine potential for structural failure of tree components according to industry benchmarks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess examination outcomes to determine potential for structural failure of tree components according to industry benchmarks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess examination outcomes to determine potential for structural failure of tree components according to industry benchmarks.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Examine tree visually for indicators of potential failure

elements.title: Undertake basic testing of tree for indicators of potential failure

pcs.text: Conduct tests for cavities according to visual indicators
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Conduct tests for cavities according to visual indicators?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Conduct tests for cavities according to visual indicators.

pcs.text: Expose root crown and examine for concealed root defects according to visual examination outcomes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Expose root crown and examine for concealed root defects according to visual examination outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Expose root crown and examine for concealed root defects according to visual examination outcomes.

pcs.text: Remove loose bark and examine stems for concealed defects according to visual examination outcomes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove loose bark and examine stems for concealed defects according to visual examination outcomes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove loose bark and examine stems for concealed defects according to visual examination outcomes.

pcs.text: Assess test outcomes for potential impact on tree health and structural integrity according to industry benchmarks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess test outcomes for potential impact on tree health and structural integrity according to industry benchmarks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess test outcomes for potential impact on tree health and structural integrity according to industry benchmarks.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Undertake basic testing of tree for indicators of potential failure

elements.title: Record tree attributes and indicators

pcs.text: Capture images and record botanical name, dimensions and location of tree under evaluation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Capture images and record botanical name, dimensions and location of tree under evaluation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Capture images and record botanical name, dimensions and location of tree under evaluation.

pcs.text: Document the results of examinations and tests conducted for tree under evaluation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document the results of examinations and tests conducted for tree under evaluation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document the results of examinations and tests conducted for tree under evaluation.

pcs.text: Capture images, location and visual indicators of defects in tree for inclusion in documentation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Capture images, location and visual indicators of defects in tree for inclusion in documentation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Capture images, location and visual indicators of defects in tree for inclusion in documentation.

pcs.text: Estimate and record dimensions of defect and affected tree component
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Estimate and record dimensions of defect and affected tree component?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Estimate and record dimensions of defect and affected tree component.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Record tree attributes and indicators

elements.title: Assess and mitigate potential risk, and document actions

pcs.text: Identify possible targets affected by tree under evaluation from client brief
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify possible targets affected by tree under evaluation from client brief?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify possible targets affected by tree under evaluation from client brief.

pcs.text: Assess identified defective tree components for structural integrity and potential risk on possible targets
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess identified defective tree components for structural integrity and potential risk on possible targets?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess identified defective tree components for structural integrity and potential risk on possible targets.

pcs.text: Validate assessment of severe defects on structural integrity of tree with consulting arborist
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Validate assessment of severe defects on structural integrity of tree with consulting arborist?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Validate assessment of severe defects on structural integrity of tree with consulting arborist.

pcs.text: Advise client of outcomes of tree defect evaluation where a heightened potential risk to targets is identified
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Advise client of outcomes of tree defect evaluation where a heightened potential risk to targets is identified?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Advise client of outcomes of tree defect evaluation where a heightened potential risk to targets is identified.

pcs.text: Take action to mitigate potential risk according to client advice and workplace policies and procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Take action to mitigate potential risk according to client advice and workplace policies and procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Take action to mitigate potential risk according to client advice and workplace policies and procedures.

pcs.text: Document action taken to mitigate potential risk on target
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Document action taken to mitigate potential risk on target?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Document action taken to mitigate potential risk on target.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Assess and mitigate potential risk, and document actions

elements.title: Document and report hazards and recommendations

pcs.text: Review and assess tree defect evaluation results, and consider options for resolving any unmitigated risk
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review and assess tree defect evaluation results, and consider options for resolving any unmitigated risk?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review and assess tree defect evaluation results, and consider options for resolving any unmitigated risk.

pcs.text: Identify and document recommended options for client approval
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and document recommended options for client approval?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and document recommended options for client approval.

pcs.text: Compile records, results and recommendations, and document tree defect evaluation report according to workplace procedures and industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Compile records, results and recommendations, and document tree defect evaluation report according to workplace procedures and industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Compile records, results and recommendations, and document tree defect evaluation report according to workplace procedures and industry standards.

pcs.text: Submit tree defect evaluation report to client according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Submit tree defect evaluation report to client according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Submit tree defect evaluation report to client according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E6: Document and report hazards and recommendations
